THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT AGRADANO, FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT ROMAN, ENRIQUE $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $520.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
APPLICANT & ORDER ON APPL.FOR WAIVER OF CT.FEES & COSTS, AS TO FRANCISCO J. AGREDANO, FILED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-13-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-21-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUANCE IS TO AWAIT OUTCOME OF RENT BOARD PROCEEDINGS.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROMAN, ENRIQUE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AGRADANO, FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
